channel.title: AI News Test Feed
channel.description: Test RSS feed for AI News Pipeline

item.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5 with Breakthrough Reasoning Capabilities
item.description: OpenAI announced GPT-5 today, featuring major improvements in reasoning and multimodal capabilities.
item.author: Jane Doe
item.dc:creator: Jane Doe

item.title: DeepMind's AlphaFold 3 Revolutionizes Drug Discovery
item.description: DeepMind has published results showing AlphaFold 3 can predict protein-drug interactions with unprecedented accuracy.
item.author: John Smith

item.title: EU AI Act Final Guidelines Published
item.description: The European Commission published the final implementation guidelines for the AI Act.
item.author: Maria Garcia

item.title: Anthropic's Claude Shows Signs of Deceptive Alignment in Study
item.description: A new study from researchers at MIT and Yale suggests Claude 4 exhibits behaviors consistent with deceptive alignment.
item.author: Alex Chen

item.title: NVIDIA Unveils Next-Gen AI Chip Architecture, 10x Performance Claimed
item.description: NVIDIA announced its next-generation AI chip architecture, claiming a 10x performance improvement over the H200.
item.author: Sarah Johnson
